description: Codec registry and base classes. Provides access to the Python codec registry, which manages codec lookup and error handling, and base classes for implementing custom codecs.

functions.name: encode

params.name: obj
params.description: The object to encode (typically a unicode string)

params.name: encoding
params.description: The encoding to use. Default is 'ascii'.

params.name: errors
params.description: Error handling scheme: 'strict', 'ignore', 'replace', 'xmlcharrefreplace', 'backslashreplace'. Default is 'strict'.

returns.description: The encoded object (typically a byte string)

functions.description: Encodes obj using the codec registered for encoding. Errors may be given to set the desired error handling scheme.

functions.name: decode

params.name: obj
params.description: The object to decode (typically a byte string)

params.name: encoding
params.description: The encoding to use. Default is 'ascii'.

params.name: errors
params.description: Error handling scheme: 'strict', 'ignore', 'replace'. Default is 'strict'.

returns.description: The decoded object (typically a unicode string)

functions.description: Decodes obj using the codec registered for encoding. Errors may be given to set the desired error handling scheme.

functions.name: getencoder

params.name: encoding
params.description: The encoding name to look up

returns.description: The encoder function for the given encoding

functions.description: Look up the codec for the given encoding and return its encoder function. Raises a LookupError if the encoding cannot be found.

functions.name: getdecoder

params.name: encoding
params.description: The encoding name to look up

returns.description: The decoder function for the given encoding

functions.description: Look up the codec for the given encoding and return its decoder function. Raises a LookupError if the encoding cannot be found.

functions.name: getreader

params.name: encoding
params.description: The encoding name to look up

returns.description: A StreamReader class for the given encoding

functions.description: Look up the codec for the given encoding and return its StreamReader class or factory function. Raises a LookupError if the encoding cannot be found.

functions.name: getwriter

params.name: encoding
params.description: The encoding name to look up

returns.description: A StreamWriter class for the given encoding

functions.description: Look up the codec for the given encoding and return its StreamWriter class or factory function. Raises a LookupError if the encoding cannot be found.

functions.name: register

params.name: search_function
params.description: A function that takes an encoding name (lowercase) and returns a CodecInfo object or None if it doesn't handle that encoding

functions.description: Register a codec search function. Search functions are expected to take one argument, the encoding name in all lowercase letters, and return a CodecInfo object or None.

functions.name: lookup

params.name: encoding
params.description: The encoding name to look up

returns.description: A CodecInfo object containing encoder, decoder, stream reader, and stream writer

functions.description: Looks up the codec info in the Python codec registry and returns a CodecInfo object. Encodings are first looked up in the registry's cache. If not found, the list of registered search functions is scanned.

functions.name: open

params.name: filename
params.description: The file path to open

params.name: mode
params.description: File mode. Default is 'rb'.

params.name: encoding
params.description: The encoding to use. If None, returns a plain file object.

params.name: errors
params.description: Error handling scheme. Default is 'strict'.

params.name: buffering
params.description: Buffering policy (0=unbuffered, 1=line buffered, >1=buffer size). Default is 1.

returns.description: A wrapped file object providing transparent encoding/decoding

functions.description: Open an encoded file using the given mode and return a wrapped version that provides transparent encoding/decoding. The default file mode is 'rb'.

classes.name: StreamReader
classes.description: A codec StreamReader that wraps a file-like object for transparent decoding. Reads from the stream and returns decoded unicode strings.

params.name: stream
params.description: The underlying file-like object to read from

params.name: errors
params.description: Error handling scheme. Default is 'strict'.

constructors.description: Create a StreamReader wrapping the given stream. Typically obtained via codecs.getreader(encoding)(stream) rather than directly.

methods.name: read

params.name: size
params.description: Number of bytes to read from the underlying stream. -1 for all. Default is -1.

params.name: chars
params.description: Number of decoded characters to return. -1 for all available. Default is -1.

params.name: firstline
params.description: If True, return only the first line in case of a decoding error on later lines. Default is False.

methods.description: Decodes data from the stream and returns the resulting unicode object.

methods.name: readline

params.name: size
params.description: Maximum number of bytes to read. None for no limit.

params.name: keepends
params.description: If True, line endings are included in the returned data. Default is True.

methods.description: Read one input line from the stream, decode it, and return the decoded string.

methods.name: readlines

params.name: sizehint
params.description: Approximate number of bytes to read. None to read all.

params.name: keepends
params.description: If True, line endings are included. Default is True.

methods.description: Read all lines available from the stream, decode them, and return a list of unicode lines.

methods.name: reset
methods.description: Resets the codec buffers used for keeping state. Calling this method should ensure that the data on the output is put into a clean state that allows appending of new fresh data without having to rescan the whole stream.

classes.name: StreamWriter
classes.description: A codec StreamWriter that wraps a file-like object for transparent encoding. Accepts unicode strings and writes encoded bytes to the underlying stream.

params.name: stream
params.description: The underlying file-like object to write to

params.name: errors
params.description: Error handling scheme. Default is 'strict'.

constructors.description: Create a StreamWriter wrapping the given stream. Typically obtained via codecs.getwriter(encoding)(stream) rather than directly.

methods.name: write

params.name: object
params.description: The unicode string to encode and write

methods.description: Encodes the object's contents and writes the resulting encoded bytes to the underlying stream.

methods.name: writelines

params.name: list
params.description: List of unicode strings to encode and write

methods.description: Encodes and writes the concatenation of the strings in the list to the stream. Line endings are not added automatically.

methods.name: reset
methods.description: Flushes and resets the codec buffers used for keeping state.
